subject: refactor(theme): consolidate to single Vivid combo (cmyk/night)
body:
Remove classic (lofi/black) and nature (emerald/forest) combos.
Keep the combo selection system functional — ThemeCombo interface,
validCombo(), getCombo(), setCombo() all remain for future expansion.
Only one combo registered: Vivid (cmyk light / night dark).

Sync points updated:
- themes.ts: single combo entry with inline instructions for adding more
- index.css: only cmyk --default and night --prefersdark registered
- index.html flash script: single combo in lookup object
- Docs: CLAUDE.md, TODO.md, HISTORY.md, SESSION_NOTES.md

Tags: theme, daisyui, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: minor
